channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: South Korea's governing party head supports suspending Yoon's powers, making impeachment more likely
item.description: SEOUL, South Korea (AP) — South Korea’s governing party chief expressed support Friday for suspending the constitutional powers of President Yoon Suk Yeol for imposing martial law this week, in a bombshell reversal that makes Yoon’s impeachment more likely.
item.dc:creator: HYUNG-JIN KIM and KIM TONG-HYUNG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Hunt for the gunman who killed UnitedHealthcare's CEO heads into third day as new clues emerge
item.description: As the investigation into a masked gunman who stalked and killed the head of one of the largest U.S. health insurers moves into its third day, possible leads have emerged about his travel before the shooting and a message scrawled on ammunition.
item.dc:creator: Michael Balsamo, Jake Offenhartz And Michael R. Sisak, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump talks up his transition and election victory as he receives Fox Nation award
item.description: GREENVALE, N.Y. (AP) — Not yet even in office, Donald Trump said Thursday he's already accomplished more than President Joe Biden did in his entire term, an outsized claim by the president-elect just a month out from the election.
item.dc:creator: JILL COLVIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Trump names David Sacks as AI, crypto czar
item.description: President-elect Trump said Thursday that venture capitalist David Sacks will serve as the White House artificial intelligence (AI) and cryptocurrency czar.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, NewsNation

item.title: 7.0 earthquake off Northern California prompts brief tsunami warning
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — A 7.0 magnitude earthquake shook a large area of Northern California on Thursday, knocking items off grocery store shelves, sending children scrambling under desks and prompting a brief tsunami warning for 5.3 million people along the U.S. West Coast.
item.dc:creator: OLGA R. RODRIGUEZ and STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Father of victim in NYC subway chokehold case sues defendant Daniel Penny
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The father of the victim at the center of the fatal New York City subway chokehold trial has sued the defendant as a Manhattan jury continued to deliberate the case Thursday.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Police test DNA and fingerprints on discarded bottle as they hunt for UnitedHealthcare CEO's killer
item.description: The masked gunman who killed the leader of one of the largest U.S. health insurance companies in front of midtown Manhattan surveillance cameras remained at large Thursday as the nation’s largest police department hunted for him.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fake bomb threat targets homes of insurance executive killed in NYC: Police
item.description: The threat was sent in an email to multiple people, who in turn alerted law enforcement, according to incident reports.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: QVC recalls 1.1 million oven gloves after more than 90 burn injury reports
item.description: QVC is recalling more than 1 million pairs of oven gloves after dozens of people were burned while using them, the U.S. Consumer Product Safety Commission has announced.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Jackson, KRON4

item.title: Fox News ‘Antisemitism Exposed’ Newsletter: Trump's warning to Hamas gives hostages' families new hope
item.description: Fox News' "Antisemitism Exposed" newsletter brings you stories on the rising anti-Jewish prejudice across the U.S. and the world.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: AI glasses to help dementia patients aims to launch next year
item.description: “It’s continuously watching your visual environment and giving you assistance,” CareYaya CEO Neal Shah said.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Prann, NewsNation

item.title: Dollar Tree could change prices, remove merchandise amid Trump's tariff plan
item.description: Dollar Tree announced they are ready to make certain changes amid President-elect Donald Trump's tariff plan.
item.dc:creator: Madie MacDonald, Fox 5

item.title: The US government is closing a women's prison and other facilities after years of abuse and decay
item.description: The Associated Press has learned that the federal Bureau of Prisons is permanently closing its “rape club” women’s prison in California and will idle six facilities in a sweeping realignment after years of abuse, decay and mismanagement.
item.dc:creator: Michael R. Sisak And Michael Balsamo, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Concerns mount over Musk’s taste for revenge
item.description: Concerns were amplified last week after Musk went after retired Army Lt. Col. Alexander Vindman, who became an outspoken critic of President-elect Trump after testifying in his first impeachment trial.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, KRON4

item.title: Laredo man charged in 2023 death of retired Border Patrol agent
item.description: A Laredo man has been arrested and charged with murder for the 2023 death of a retired South Texas Border Patrol agent, according to law enforcement.
item.dc:creator: Sandra Sanchez, NewsNation

item.title: Bitcoin hits $100,000 after Trump names pro-crypto SEC chair
item.description: The former president is bolstering the evolving platform amidst the threat of new currency systems seeking to challenge the U.S. dollar.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, ABC 4

item.title: Authorities continue investigating unusual drone activity around Trump's golf club in New Jersey: video
item.description: Officials are still investigating unusual drone activity reported in recent weeks in New Jersey. The FAA set temporary restrictions above Trump National Golf Club in Bedminster.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Police say searchers don’t expect to find woman in Pennsylvania sinkhole alive
item.description: UNITY TOWNSHIP, Pa. (AP) — The search for a woman who is believed to have fallen into a sinkhole in western Pennsylvania has become a recovery effort after two treacherous days of digging through mud and rock produced no signs of life, authorities said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: GENE PUSKAR and MARK SCOLFORO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Two children, ages 5 and 6, wounded in shooting at California school; suspect dead
item.description: A suspected gunman was killed after a shooting at Feather River School of Seventh-Day Adventists in Palermo, Butte County.
item.dc:creator: Sergio Robles, KRON4

item.title: Supreme Court Latest: Majority of justices appear likely to uphold state ban on transgender care
item.description: The Supreme Court heard arguments on Wednesday in just its second major transgender rights case, a challenge to a Tennessee law that bans gender-affirming care for minors.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trooper, the dog abandoned on I-75 before Hurricane Milton, finds forever home
item.description: Trooper, the dog who was rescued by the Florida Highway Patrol during Hurricane Milton has now been adopted, the Leon County Humane Society announced.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, Fox 5

item.title: California farmers are hopeful Trump administration will deliver more water to fields
item.description: Since winning the election, President-elect Donald Trump has been talking about immigration, border security and government efficiency. But in California farm country, his comments about water are also getting top attention.
item.dc:creator: AMY TAXIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump’s pick to run the DEA withdraws his name from consideration. Trump says he pulled the plug
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Chad Chronister, Donald Trump's pick to run the Drug Enforcement Administration, has withdrawn his name from consideration for the job, becoming the second person selected by the president-elect to bow out quickly after being selected for a position requiring Senate confirmation.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE L. PRICE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Harris found success with women who have cats, but Trump got the dog owner vote: AP VoteCast
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The lead-up to the 2024 election was all about cat owners. But in the end, the dogs had their day.
item.dc:creator: LINLEY SANDERS, HUMERA LODHI and ANNIE NG, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Hannah Kobayashi's family says search is 'far from over' after police reveal she voluntarily left for Mexico
item.description: Authorities may consider Hannah Kobayashi a "voluntary missing person," but her family isn't done looking for her.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KRON4

item.title: Community 'college deserts' leave students stranded from higher education
item.description: College deserts have gained more attention in recent years as they are considered a significant reason some groups are not attending college.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, KRON4

item.title: Frontier Airlines to roll out first-class seating, other perks in 2025
item.description: Frontier Airlines will offer first-class seating for the first time in its history starting in late 2025, the company announced Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Samantha Jarpe, ABC 4

item.title: No winner for Mega Millions, jackpot grows to $579 million
item.description: No one won the Mega Millions drawing on Tuesday night. The jackpot has now grown to an estimated $579 million ahead of the next drawing on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Knight, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US closes investigation into E. coli outbreak linked to onions in McDonald's Quarter Pounders
item.description: The U.S. government said Tuesday it has closed its investigation into an E. coli outbreak tied to McDonald's Quarter Pounder hamburgers after determining there is no longer a safety risk. The outbreak, which was first reported Oct.
item.dc:creator: DEE-ANN DURBIN and JONEL ALECCIA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Search suspended for man believed to have gone overboard from cruise ship off California's coast
item.description: The U.S. Coast Guard said Tuesday that it has suspended the search for a man believed to have gone overboard from a cruise ship as it was returning to San Francisco after a voyage to Ensenada, Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: US biathletes fear retaliation for speaking out about sexual harassment, report finds
item.description: U.S. biathletes face “misogynistic” behavior while racing and fear retaliation if they report their concerns, according to an inquiry by an independent contractor hired to assess athlete safety. The investigation of U.S.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: California teacher dies after suspected bat bite in her classroom
item.description: A central California middle school teacher died after contracting rabies from a suspected bat bite, local health officials said.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, WFLA, NBC

item.title: The drinking water for New Jersey's capital went largely untested for more than a year, utility says
item.description: TRENTON, N.J. (AP) — The drinking water in New Jersey's capital city and some surrounding communities went largely untested for more than a year, the utility belatedly told roughly 200,000 affected customers, noting that it fired a worker who falsified the relevant reports.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CATALINI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: WATCH: Train slams into stuck semi-truck in Pennsylvania
item.description: City police believe the truck got hung up on the snow and the driver couldn't pull away before having to exit the cab before the train struck.
item.dc:creator: Bill Palmer, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Here's the top 25 list of most-viewed Wikipedia articles of 2024
item.description: We collectively spent an estimated 2.4 billion hours reading English-language articles on Wikipedia in 2024, and we now know which were the most popular.
item.dc:creator: Christopher Adams, Fox 5

item.title: Police say a Hawaii woman disappeared voluntarily and traveled to Mexico
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — A Hawaii woman who vanished after landing in Los Angeles three weeks ago disappeared voluntarily as she sought to “step away from modern connectivity” and was last seen crossing into Mexico with her luggage, police said at a news conference where they urged her to contact her dist
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN and JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LAPD give update on Maui woman who vanished in Los Angeles
item.description: Authorities are set to update the public Monday evening with the latest details on Hannah Kobayashi, a 30-year-old Maui resident who has been the center of a massive search since she vanished in Los Angeles in early November.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, ABC 4
